name: proposal-software-directory
description: A comprehensive website for collecting and managing proposal software data

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && bun dev" "cd frontend && bun dev" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "red,blue"
scripts.build: cd backend && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun run build
scripts.install:all: cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && bunx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:fresh: bun run db:reset && bun run db:seed
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose down -v && docker system prune -f
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && bun start" "cd frontend && bun start"
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && bun run type-check && cd ../backend && tsc --noEmit
scripts.format: cd frontend && bunx prettier --write . && cd ../backend && bunx prettier --write .
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/.next frontend/node_modules backend/dist backend/node_modules node_modules
